metadata.description: A curated marketplace of high-quality community sports plugins for Claude Code, Codex, and AI coding assistants. Covers college baseball sabermetrics, live scores, sports analytics, and fantasy sports.

plugins.name: college-baseball-sabermetrics
plugins.description: Deep sabermetrics and analytics for college baseball — pitcher evaluation, lineup construction, game data pipelines, and advanced metrics tuned for NCAA and Texas Longhorns coverage.

plugins.name: sports-analytics
plugins.description: General-purpose sports analytics plugin for building data pipelines, interactive stat visualizations, and predictive models across MLB, NFL, NBA, and college sports.

plugins.name: live-scores
plugins.description: Real-time scoreboard UI components and live data integration patterns for embedding live scores in web apps and mobile clients.

plugins.name: fantasy-sports
plugins.description: Fantasy sports tooling for AI-assisted draft strategy, trade analysis, and waiver wire decisions across NFL, MLB, NBA, and college sports.
